block.text: Your robot takes to the air, and you can soon see the enemy encampment. But the enemy air patrols are vigilant: two flying robots swoop to challenge you. They do not ask for a password, but open fire immediately. You must fight these two Myrmidon robots. The Myrmidon is the standard Karossean combat robot. It has two forms — humanoid and fighter-plane. These two are in plane form and will not try to change during the battle. First MYRMIDON ARMOURS SPEED Very Fast SKILL Second MYRMIDON ARMOUR 8 SPEED Very Fast SKILL 9 SPECIAL ABILITIES: None If you defeat the two Myrmidons, turn to 75. If they defeat you, turn to 125. If you Escape, turn to 98.

choice.text: None If you defeat the two Myrmidons.
